1.blurb: Where every rookie starts — foundational patterns, no clock running.

2.tagline: Fog everywhere — charts show no patterns
2.blurb: The hint is hidden by default. Solve against the clock or spend an Oracle Fruit to see the pattern.

3.blurb: Where the toughest bosses wait. Not for the faint of heart.

mechanics.name: Bounty (XP)
mechanics.blurb: Earned from every solve. Total bounty sets your level.

mechanics.name: Level
mechanics.blurb: Rises automatically as your bounty grows.

mechanics.name: Streak
mechanics.blurb: Consecutive days solved — always derived from your log, never a device counter.

mechanics.name: Star
mechanics.blurb: Earned by beating a timed problem's clock.

mechanics.name: Boss fights
mechanics.blurb: Each island ends in a boss problem — the only source of cursed fruit.

mechanics.name: Map vs List
mechanics.blurb: Toggle between the visual sea chart and a plain keyboard-friendly list.

how_it_works.text: Solve the real problem on LeetCode
